original_snippet_context: Discussing the financial program of the future president and the potential impacts of certain policies.
relevant_quote: S. Ex. quer a caixa do Sr. Campista, como quer as tarifas do Sr. João Luiz Alves — fataes apparelhos, que hão de trazer-nos, mesmo antes de funccionarem, os mais amargos soffrimentos.
justification: While not explicitly mentioning "Caixa de Conversão," the reference to "caixa do Sr. Campista" likely alludes to it, portraying it negatively as a "fatal apparatus" that will bring suffering. This aligns with orthodox fears of negative economic consequences.
